action.description: Command action name (SaveDraftPage, PublishPageVersion, UpsertRoute, UpsertProduct, AssignRole, UpsertProfile, GrantEntitlement).

requestId.description: Idempotency key; must be unique per successful command.

expectedVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency guard; optional for purely append-only actions.

signatureRef.description: Reference to signature or capability proof.

role.description: Actor role used for action allowlists.

payload.description: Action-specific payload validated by action schema.
